name: Epoxy Coating
description: Two-part epoxy systems offering outstanding adhesion, chemical resistance, and hardness. Ideal for substrates exposed to chemicals, moisture, and mechanical wear.

name: Polyurethane (PU) Coating
description: Flexible, UV-resistant topcoat with an excellent gloss finish. Used as a topcoat over epoxy systems for outdoor structural and architectural applications.

name: Alkyd Coating
description: Oil-modified resin coating suitable for mild to moderate environments. Cost-effective for general industrial and maintenance painting.

name: Zinc Rich Primer
description: Cathodic protection primer containing high levels of zinc dust. Provides sacrificial protection to steel — the gold standard first coat for corrosion prevention.
